title: lathyrus montanus f. pyrenaicus
intro: Lathyrus montanus f. pyrenaicus is a subspecies of the alpine peacock's tail, a perennial flowering plant in the pea family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mediterranean and European herbalism. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. Lathyrus montanus f. pyrenaicus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
